ideation: This sequence simulates the action of a water polo player, focusing on the arm movements involved in throwing the ball. The left arm will primarily act as a counterbalance, while the right arm will execute the throw.  I will strive for a natural, dynamic sequence that captures the energy of the sport.  The robot's lack of elbows will require creative use of the shoulder joints to approximate the throwing motion. I will reference the existing examples to ensure smooth transitions and to keep the arm movements within the robot's capabilities.

frames.beat: arms poised for action, right arm ready
right arm swings forward, launching the throw
right arm follows through, left arm balances
both arms return to a resting state
